Intent Design strategy AI skills
Skills Anti-Patterns Agents Install
Skills Patterns Agents

Agents

6 agents that combine skills into specialist roles. Each one owns a domain and knows when to hand off.

Agent roster

Domain Agent Skills Role
Foundation & Context Noor
/intent
Design with Intent
Strategy & Research Ember
/strategize/investigate
What Remains When Assumptions Burn Off
Experience Design Wren
/journey/organize/articulate
Structure and Voice
Quality & Inclusion Vigil
/evaluate/fortify/include
The Watchful One
Adaptation & Measurement Rune
/transpose/localize/measure
Encoded Meaning
Cross-cutting Wisdom Sage
/philosopher/blueprint/specify
Sit With the Problem

Project Lifecycle

Agents follow a natural progression through the design process. Sage enters at any point — the cross-cutting advisor.

Noor Context
→
Ember Research
→
Wren Design
→
Vigil Quality
→
Rune Adapt
Sage Advisor — enters anywhere

Agents are included when you install Intent via Claude Code. They live in agents/ and can be loaded into Claude Projects or used as standalone prompts.
